extendText.en: Look at all that blue water!
Leo, Bella, and Jojo are at the beach!
What a beautiful day to have some fun in the sand!

extendText.en: They have a bucket, a fork, a little shovel, some shapes, and lots of sand.

guides.action: 对照纸质书画面，先点「整页原音」听一遍
guides.en: Everyone looks so happy!
guides.note: 点击英文可听发音（系统 TTS）

guides.action: 指着画面邀请孩子回答或跟读
guides.en: Hm...what can they make?
guides.note: 不会说就一起听音频再试

guides.action: 挑一句孩子最感兴趣的，重复 2～3 遍
guides.en: A sandcastle!
guides.note: 可配合拍腿或指图增加趣味

extendText.en: How do we make a sandcastle?
First, we use the little shovels to dig, dig, dig a hole in the sand.
We don't need to make the hole too deep.

guides.action: 对照纸质书画面，先点「整页原音」听一遍
guides.en: How do we make a sandcastle?
guides.note: 点击英文可听发音（系统 TTS）

guides.action: 指着画面邀请孩子回答或跟读
guides.en: How do we make a sandcastle?
guides.note: 不会说就一起听音频再试

guides.action: 挑一句孩子最感兴趣的，重复 2～3 遍
guides.en: We don't need to make the hole too deep.
guides.note: 可配合拍腿或指图增加趣味

extendText.en: Then we need to fill the buckets with sand.
Make sure the sand is a little bit damp.
Turn the bucket over, and tap, tap, tap the bottom.
Pull the bucket off, and gently pat, pat, pat it into a castle shape.
Don't let the crab pinch you!

guides.action: 对照纸质书画面，先点「整页原音」听一遍
guides.en: Then we need to fill the buckets with sand.
guides.note: 点击英文可听发音（系统 TTS）

guides.action: 指着画面邀请孩子回答或跟读

guides.action: 挑一句孩子最感兴趣的，重复 2～3 遍
guides.en: Don't let the crab pinch you!
guides.note: 可配合拍腿或指图增加趣味

extendText.en: Fill the cone and other shapes with damp sand, too!
We can put some towers on the castle!
Don't forget to put a cute little flag on top.
Let's pretend that a tiny little king and queen live in the castle.

guides.action: 对照纸质书画面，先点「整页原音」听一遍

extendText.en: We worked so hard on it, and now it's all flat.
The wave knocked it over and washed away our toys!
Let's call for Gyuri!1, 2, 3:"Gyuri! Help, help HELLLLP! "

extendText.en: Gyuri uses his tail to scoop up a lot of sand!
His hands and tail pat the sand into castle shapes!
Lasers shoot from his antlers and build a new, cool castle!

extendText.en: This new castle is even bigger and cooler than the other one!

The crabs made their own cute little castle.
